def positive_python_perf_layer_framework_performance_celery_task_loads_config_each_run():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_framework_performance_celery_task_loads_config_each_run"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag Celery tasks loading settings, models, or clients on every invocation without reuse."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
